subject: A large hooded falcon in flight over a fantasy city skyline
description: A large bird of prey — a falcon or hawk — soars in the foreground with wings spread wide. It wears a cloth falconry hood over its head. Below and behind it, a cityscape of tall spires and towers stretches into a hazy sky with scattered clouds. In the background on a stone pillar, a winged gargoyle-like statue is faintly visible. The bird's feathers are warm brown and rust tones. The scene conveys height and surveillance, the trained bird acting as an aerial scout above the city.
foreground: Large hooded falcon with wings spread, in flight
background: Fantasy city skyline with spires and towers, hazy sky and clouds
emotion: Alert and predatory, the bird surveys the city below with focused intensity
